leadText: Diamond Heath (Japanese: コンゴウの里山 Diamond Woodlands) is an area located in the northern region of the Crimson Mirelands of Hisui. Cloudpool Ridge lies to the northwest and the Golden Lowlands lies to the south. It forms the outskirts of the Diamond Settlement. In modern day Sinnoh, the area may have become part of Route 210.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Diamond Heath is a location that is slightly elevated from the Diamond Settlement to its south. The plant life is limited here compared to its neighbors, featuring trees sparsely decorated with dark-green leaves. It is rather barren and rocky, with its other features being boulders, ore deposits, and Iron Chunks on the eroded land.
